title: Match data search from all CSV files
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:391 loads all 6 CSV files (Brasileirao_Matches, Brazilian_Cup_Matches, Libertadores_Matches, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data); QueryEngine.find_matches() supports team, opponent, season, competition, date_range filters

title: Player data search and filtering
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:301-343 QueryEngine.search_players() filters by name, nationality, club, position, rating; brazil_soccer_mcp/server.py:95-100 exposes search_players tool

title: Basic statistics calculation
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:187-236 QueryEngine.team_record() calculates wins, losses, draws, goals_for, goals_against, win_rate; points calculation implemented with 3*wins + draws formula

title: Team head-to-head comparison
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:238-280 QueryEngine.head_to_head() and compare_teams() compute meeting records, win counts, goal aggregates; tests/test_team_queries.py:39-53 verify head-to-head totals

title: Team name variation normalization
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/normalize.py:228 normalize_team() handles Palmeiras-SP, Palmeiras, and full names; tests/test_match_queries.py:43-48 verify Palmeiras-SP and Palmeiras resolve to same matches

title: Competition queries and standings
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:397-450 standings(), competition_winner(), relegated() compute league tables from match results; server.py:113-128 expose competition tools

title: Statistical analysis (biggest wins, league stats)
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:480-520 implements biggest_wins(), league_statistics(), best_record(); server.py:131-154 expose stats tools

title: Date format handling
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/normalize.py:95-140 parse_date() handles ISO format, Brazilian DD/MM/YYYY format, and datetime strings

title: UTF-8 encoding and accents support
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/normalize.py:48-85 strip_accents() handles São Paulo, Grêmio, Avaí; player names and team names with special characters parsed correctly in tests

title: Cross-file queries
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/query_engine.py:356-375 club_player_summary() searches FIFA data for players at Brazilian clubs; tests/test_player_queries.py verify cross-file functionality

title: All 52 tests passing
evidence: pytest output: 52 passed in 0.95s; test categories: match_queries (7), team_queries (6), competition_queries (6), player_queries (7), normalization (12), statistics (7), mcp_server (7)

title: All 6 CSV data files present and loadable
evidence: data/kaggle/: Brasileirao_Matches.csv (4,180 rows), Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv (1,337 rows), Libertadores_Matches.csv (1,255 rows), BR-Football-Dataset.csv (10,296 rows), novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv (6,886 rows), fifa_data.csv (18,207 rows)

title: 17 tools exposed via MCP
evidence: server.py:169-174 _TOOLS list includes: find_matches, last_match, team_record, head_to_head, compare_teams, competitions_for_team, search_players, get_player, brazilian_clubs_summary, standings, competition_winner, relegated_teams, league_statistics, biggest_wins, best_record, top_scoring_team, data_summary
